title: Vizcarra
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Vizcarra |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Vizcarra system/Legends|Vizcarra system]] |sector=[[Cegul sector/Legends|Cegul sector]] |system=[[Vizcarra system/Legends|Vizcarra system]] |coordinates=L-20''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Vizcarra system/Legends|Vizcarra system]] |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]'' |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]{{JournalCite|3|When the Domino Falls}} }} {{Quote|They're shipping me off to Vizcarra.''"
"''The Imperial prison planet?''"
"''Yep. And here I sit, picking my nose hairs, with half of my crew docked across the street, waiting for me.|Tait Ransom and Karl Mathieu Ancher|}} '''Vizcarra''' was a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Cegul sector/Legends|Cegul sector]]. The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Syychi]], who went on to be [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the Empire, was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] there, and at one point she and the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Memcha-Badawzi]]—who was sentenced to [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisonment]] on Vizcarra—both escaped from an [[Slaver/Legends|enslaver]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] traveling to the planet. Similarly, in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] the smuggler [[Tait Ransom]] also escaped from detention on the planet [[Omman Minor]] before he could be shipped off to Vizcarra. ==Description== Vizcarra was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Vizcarra system/Legends|Vizcarra system]], a part of the [[Cegul sector/Legends|Cegul sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it served as an Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prison]] world. ==History== [[File:Syychi.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The Wookiee Syychi was born on Vizcarra.]] At some point, the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Syychi]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Vizcarra, becoming subjected since birth to Imperial exploitation and [[Slavery/Legends|enslavement]]. Around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of {{JournalCite|3|When the Domino Falls}} to [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]. Imperial authorities on [[Omman Minor]], a planet in the [[Kibilini sector/Legends|Kibilini sector]],{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Omman Minor system/Legends|Omman Minor system]] arrested the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Tait Ransom]] for illegal handling of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]]. In 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] Ransom was held in the holding cells of Omman Minor's [[Bureau of Customs]], where he informed his fellow detainees [[Karl Mathieu Ancher]], [[Drake Paulsen]], and [[Nikaede Celso]] that he was scheduled to be shipped off to Vizcarra. However, the quartet subsequently broke out of the cell and escaped the planet. The [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] smuggler [[Memcha-Badawzi]] was at one point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] sentenced to imprisonment on Vizcarra for smuggling [[Spice/Legends|spice]] and being suspected of collaborating with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. She was sent on a long trip to Vizcarra aboard an [[Slaver/Legends|enslaver]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] on which Syychi was also present. The pair, aided by other [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]], eventually managed to overpower the ship's crew and escape. ==Behind the scenes== Vizcarra was first mentioned in the short story "[[When the Domino Falls]]," which was written by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] and published in the [[August]] [[1994]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|third issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vizcarra [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet, in grid square L-20. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|3|When the Domino Falls|reprint=1}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Vizcarra }} [[Category:Cegul sector locations]] [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Prison planets]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
